title: KILT's Mandela Day food drive rolled out
description: KNYSNA NEWS - In celebration of Mandela Day,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - In celebration of Mandela Day, the Knysna Initiative for Learning and Teaching (KILT) is launching its annual food drive with the goal of collecting 6 700 non-perishable items to support local soup kitchens.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - In celebration of Mandela Day, the Knysna Initiative for Learning and Teaching (KILT) is launching its annual food drive with the goal of collecting 6 700 non-perishable items to support local soup kitchens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Community members are encouraged to drop off donations outside Woolworths at Knysna Mall between 09:00 and 16:00 on 18 July.","html":"Community members are encouraged to drop off donations outside Woolworths at Knysna Mall between 09:00 and 16:00 on 18 July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The food will be sorted and delivered to soup kitchens in Nekkies, Hornlee, Concordia and central Knysna that provide warm meals to vulnerable families throughout the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Requested items include samp and beans, lentils, barley, soup mixes, rice, pap and tinned foods. \"Every item adds up to a meal. Every meal adds up to hope,\" says KILT.","html":"Requested items include samp and beans, lentils, barley, soup mixes, rice, pap and tinned foods. \"Every item adds up to a meal. Every meal adds up to hope,\" says KILT."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, contact KILT or visit its social media pages.","html":"For more information, contact KILT or visit its social media pages."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: KILT's Mandela Day food drive rolled out
